title: Design Hero Section Component
description: Create a new reusable HeroSection React component to serve as the hero area at the top of the chat playground page.
details:
Implement a new functional component (e.g., HeroSection.tsx) in the components directory. The hero should include a prominent title (e.g., 'AI Chat Playground'), a brief subtitle/description, and optional supporting visuals (icon or illustration, if desired). Ensure the component uses semantic HTML (e.g.,
,

,

) and is accessible (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation). Use TypeScript for props and internal state (if any).
test_strategy: Render the component in isolation (Storybook or test page) and verify that all text and visuals appear as intended. Use accessibility tools (axe, Lighthouse) to check ARIA and keyboard navigation. Confirm TypeScript type safety.

title: Integrate Hero Section into Global Layout
description: Add the HeroSection component to the main layout or chat playground page so it appears above the chat interface.
details: Import the HeroSection component into layout.tsx or the main page (likely page.tsx for '/'). Place it above the ChatArea and ChatInput components, ensuring proper visual hierarchy. Adjust spacing and structure as needed to maintain a clean, uncluttered look. Ensure the hero section is only present on the main playground page, not globally across all routes unless specified.
test_strategy: Load the main playground page and verify the hero section appears at the top, above the chat UI. Check that the layout remains responsive and visually balanced on both desktop and mobile.

title: Style the Hero Section for Responsiveness and Accessibility
description: Apply styles to the HeroSection to ensure it is visually appealing, responsive, and accessible across devices.
details: Use globals.css or a component-specific CSS module to style the hero section. Ensure large, readable typography for the title and subtitle, appropriate spacing, and alignment. Make sure the section adapts to different screen sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop). Add focus outlines and color contrast for accessibility. Avoid style collisions with existing global styles.
test_strategy: Test the hero section on multiple viewport sizes and devices. Use browser accessibility tools to verify color contrast, focus states, and ARIA compliance. Confirm no visual regressions in the chat UI.

title: Write Unit and Integration Tests for Hero Section
description: Ensure the HeroSection component renders correctly and integrates smoothly with the main layout.
details: Write unit tests (using Jest and React Testing Library) to check that the HeroSection renders the correct title, subtitle, and visuals. Add integration tests to verify the hero section appears in the correct place on the main page and does not interfere with chat functionality. Test for accessibility attributes and keyboard navigation.
test_strategy: Run all tests and ensure 100% coverage for the HeroSection. Use snapshot tests for visual structure. Validate accessibility with automated tools and manual keyboard navigation.
